text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, I'd better check my shift times.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm, I've still got a few gaps around here. I
should be able to fit in a one-time gig, at least.
But then...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I try to squeeze in more work, it means I'll have
less time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. I wish I could just be energetic all the time without having to rest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Ines Fujin is still a bit worn out from
her races. I might have to rearrange her upcoming
race schedule.
